Your Inquiry

"I want to start a daily practice of silence. How should I begin based on our current teaching?"

The Practice of Silence

In our current series, Practicing the Way, we are exploring the foundational rhythms of the spiritual life. Silence is not just the absence of noise, but the presence of God.

A Simple Way to Begin

01
timer

Set a timer for 5 minutes.

02
air

Choose a breath prayer (e.g., "Come, Holy Spirit").

03
psychology

Return to the breath when your mind wanders.

route

Discipleship Pathway

This practice is a key part of your current stage in the Discipleship Pathway (Practice).

groups

Community Life

Your community group is discussing this on Tuesday night.

Ready to deepen your practice?

May you find rest in the stillness.

Deepening the Well

Continue your journey with our curated audio liturgies designed for morning and evening stillness.
